2606.24672.title: Cost-Optimal Decision Diagrams for Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation
2606.24672.paper_summary: In many decision-making scenarios, acquiring information incurs different costs. We consider the problem of constructing a deterministic evaluation strategy that minimizes the expected cost of evaluating a propositional formula under variable costs and a probability distribution over truth assignments. We present a branch-and-bound algorithm with variable-selection heuristics, pruning, and caching. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first practical exact algorithm for this level of generality. Experiments on random instances demonstrate scalability and quantify the efficiency-quality trade-off of a greedy beam-search variant. We additionally evaluate a structured heart-disease diagnosis instance. Finally, we prove that the problem is $\#P$-hard and contained in $\mathrm{PSPACE}$.
2606.24672.paper_summary_zh: 在許多決策情境中，獲取資訊會產生不同的成本。<lb/>我們考慮在變量成本和真值分配的概率分佈下，構建一個確定性評估策略以最小化評估命題公式的期望成本的問題。<lb/>我們提出了一種具有變量選擇啟發式、剪枝和快取的分支限界算法。<lb/>據我們所知，這是首個針對這一廣泛性水平的實用精確算法。<lb/>對隨機實例的實驗展示了可擴展性並量化了貪婪束搜索變體的效率與質量的權衡。<lb/>我們還評估了一個結構化的心臟病診斷實例。<lb/>最後，我們證明了該問題是 $\#P$-困難的，並且包含在 $\mathrm{PSPACE}$ 中。
2606.24672.author: Xia Zong et.al.
2606.24672.authors: Xia Zong, Tuomo Lehtonen, Jussi Rintanen
